properties.name: coco.mybatis-plus.pagination.enabled
properties.description: Whether Coco registers the default MyBatis-Plus pagination inner interceptor.

properties.name: coco.mybatis-plus.pagination.db-type
properties.description: Database type used by the pagination inner interceptor. Leave empty to let MyBatis-Plus infer it from the current data source.

properties.name: coco.mybatis-plus.pagination.overflow
properties.description: Whether an overflow page number should fall back to the first page.

properties.name: coco.mybatis-plus.pagination.max-limit
properties.description: Maximum page size allowed by the pagination inner interceptor. Empty or non-positive values mean unlimited.

properties.name: coco.mybatis-plus.pagination.optimize-join
properties.description: Whether the pagination count SQL should optimize join clauses.
